name: Mediterranean Roasted Potatoes for Clay Cooker
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper - to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Soak a clay cooker in water for 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Place potatoes and onions in the cooker. Toss with oil.
4. Add olives, pine nuts, garlic, and raisins.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Mix in vermouth.
7. Roast for 1 hour or until tender.
8. Remove the cooker from the oven and place it on a towel for 10 minutes.
9. Do not place the hot cooker on a cold surface.
10. Let cool for 10 minutes.
11. Remove the lid and stir in sliced basil.
12. Garnish with basil leaves and serve.
